Name: update_departments_many
SQL: WITH mutation_result_0 AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "description" = $1::text WHERE departments."id" = $2::uuid RETURNING *) SELECT jsonb_build_array((SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result_0), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result_0."id" AS "id", mutation_result_0."name" AS "name", "mutation_result_0.r.employees"."employees" AS "employees" FROM mutation_result_0 LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("mutation_result_0.r.employees"), '[]') AS "employees" FROM (WITH "mutation_result_0.r.employees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "department_id" = "mutation_result_0"."id") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result_0.r.employees.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "mutation_result_0.r.employees.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "mutation_result_0.r.employees" FROM "mutation_result_0.r.employees.base") AS "mutation_result_0.r.employees") AS "mutation_result_0.r.employees" ON ('true')) AS "_e"))))
